title: Ultimate Bosses
description: Bosses to make sure you have more to do after you slay the Ender Dragon
body:
# Welcome to Ultimate Bosses, a datapack that aims to add more high-quality bosses to make sure that you have more to do after you slay the ender dragon.

## Bosses:
- The Lost Angel﻿
- The Eye
- The Storm
- Sorcerer
- And more coming soon!

## Mini Bosses:
- Zombie Horseman
- Flying Witch
- Blue Shulker
- Big Phantom
- Stacked Blaze
- Death Tip
- Firework Pillager
- Evoker King
- Enderman King
- Poseidon


## Lecense:
- You may not redistribute this project
- You may use in YouTube videos as long as you leave some form of credit
- You may not use in public servers, unless I gave you permission
- You may not copy or steal code from this project
- If you have any questions about license, please ask
